note: Full article text is not retained here or anywhere in this repository (per ER-002-S1.1 Git tracking policy). Only outlet, paraphrased headline/gist, publish date, and URL are recorded.

sources.paraphrased_headline: Argentina's late comeback eliminates England and sends the defending champions into the final
sources.paraphrased_gist: England led through Anthony Gordon, but Enzo Fernandez equalized and Lautaro Martinez scored the winner in the 92nd minute, with Lionel Messi involved in both late goals.

sources.paraphrased_headline: England's coach and captain reflect on the team's late semifinal collapse
sources.paraphrased_gist: FIFA's official match coverage confirms Argentina's 2-1 victory and England's disappointment after conceding twice near the end.

sources.paraphrased_headline: Argentine supporters celebrate the semifinal victory over England
sources.paraphrased_gist: AP confirms the result and describes major public celebrations in Argentina, where the match also revived memories of the countries' famous 1986 World Cup rivalry.
